details: AC1: Mini health summary shown after state-transitioning commands (feature new, feature complete) with pass/warn counts
AC2: 4 specific pre-condition warnings: feature prompt (incomplete artifacts), feature complete (<50% artifacts), feature new (brownfield without discover), gatekeep (without adversarial review)
AC3: Warnings are advisory (non-blocking), visible with yellow + warning icon
AC4: --no-warnings flag suppresses all proactive warnings, registered globally in main.ts and per-command
AC5: Warning logic centralized in registerWarning() system in src/kernel/hooks/pre-command.ts, not duplicated per command
AC6: Per-feature warning snooze via snoozeWarning() with 24h default, persisted to .devflow/warnings-snooze.json

codingStandards.typeScriptErrors: 0 errors in new/modified hook files (pre-existing errors in feature-complete.ts from other stories unchanged)
codingStandards.testCoverage: 14 tests covering all warning conditions, snooze persistence, health summary, noWarnings flag
details: Files follow src/kernel/hooks/ structure matching existing kernel patterns
Dynamic imports for lazy loading (consistent with codebase style)
No new dependencies added — uses existing picocolors and fs utilities

testing.integrationTests: N/A (internal hook system tested with real FS in unit tests)
testing.e2eTests: Full suite: 894/900 pass (6 pre-existing failures unrelated to this story)
testing.edgeCases: Corrupt snooze file, missing featureId, missing directories, non-relevant command names, warning function errors

summary: Story 2.4 (Feedback Hooks) fully implemented: centralized hook/warning system in src/kernel/hooks/, 4 pre-condition warnings, mini health summary, --no-warnings flag, per-feature snooze persistence, all 14 tests pass.
